sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27390" key="diploi+so/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διπλο-ϊσότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n27390.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">double equation,</tr_> Dioph.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.96T.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
